name: SonarCloud for Open Source
description: Free static analysis for open-source projects on SonarQube Cloud, with unlimited members, feature branch analysis, and custom quality standards.

perks.title: Free Static Analysis
perks.description: Analyze public projects for free with support for code quality and security scanning.

perks.title: Unlimited Members
perks.description: Scale your team without limits — invite all contributors at no cost.

perks.title: Feature Branch Analysis
perks.description: Catch issues before they hit your main branch with feature branch analysis.

perks.title: Custom Quality Standards
perks.description: Define your own standards for code quality and security.

perks.title: GitHub Members Sync
perks.description: Seamlessly manage your contributors with automatic GitHub members sync.

eligibility: Must be a publicly available open-source project.
Repository must be public on GitHub.
applicationProcess: Sign up for SonarQube Cloud with your GitHub organization.
Public projects automatically qualify for the free OSS plan.
